summary_en: ¥60.0M upper limit, 20,000 shares (1.43% of S/O), open-market purchase, May 22–June 30, 2026. Purpose: future stock-option exercises and restricted-stock-unit awards, plus flexibility for capital policy.
title_en: Notice regarding decision on matters concerning acquisition of treasury shares (acquisition of treasury shares pursuant to the articles of incorporation under the provisions of Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Nova System Co., Ltd. (TSE Standard: 5257) announced on May 21, 2026 that its board of directors has authorized the acquisition of up to 20,000 treasury shares (1.43% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for an upper limit of ¥60.0 million. The purchase will occur via open-market transactions on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from May 22 through June 30, 2026. The company stated that the acquisition is intended to provide shares for future stock-option exercises and restricted-stock-unit awards under its incentive programs, as well as to enable flexible capital allocation decisions. As of May 15, 2026, the company held 1,183 treasury shares out of 1,401,317 shares outstanding.
